name: Jersey One Limo

fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit tuck-in. Tiny rural Louisiana operator with no identifiable school-district relationships or special-needs school contracts; likely Medicaid NEMT, outside Summit's yellow-bus/SPED school platform.
